failedAssertions.reason: Category->label mapping to GitHub issue payload is MISSING. The validation contract and AGENTS.md require 'Labels from category (BUG->bug, FEATURE_REQUEST->enhancement, SUPPORT->support)' in the GitHub API payload. GitHubIssueClient.createIssue() only sends title and body — no 'labels' array is included. The category appears in the issue title as '[CATEGORY] Subject' but this is NOT equivalent to GitHub issue labels. All other aspects pass: local persistence, async GitHub push, graceful degradation, tenant context in body.
